# Flutter E-Commerce App with Firebase

This is a Flutter e-commerce application similar to Amazon/Flipkart with Firebase backend integration.

## Project Overview
- **Frontend**: Flutter (Mobile App)
- **Backend**: Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Storage)
- **State Management**: Provider
- **Design**: Material Design

## Features
- User Authentication (Google & Email/Password)
- Product Catalog with Search & Filter
- Shopping Cart and Order Placement
- Real-time Order Tracking with Stepper UI
- Admin Panel for Product & Order Management
- User Profile and Order History

## Project Structure
- `lib/screens/` - All app screens
- `lib/widgets/` - Reusable widgets
- `lib/services/` - Firebase and API services
- `lib/models/` - Data models
- `lib/providers/` - State management
- `lib/utils/` - Helper functions and constants

## Development Guidelines
- Follow Flutter best practices
- Use Provider for state management
- Implement proper error handling
- Add proper loading states
- Use responsive design principles
